methods.method_name: Lipid Biomarker Extraction and Isotope Analysis
methods.description: Extraction of lipid biomarkers (leaf wax n-alkanes) from paleosol, soil, and plant samples, followed by compound-specific hydrogen (δD) and carbon (δ13C) isotope ratio analysis using GC-IRMS.

steps.description: Lipid biomarkers were extracted from 27 oven-dried paleosol samples, 28 soil and 10 plant samples from 36 locations throughout the KG valley.
steps.searchable_summary: Oven dry paleosol, soil, and plant samples

steps.searchable_summary: Extract lipid biomarkers from dried samples

steps.description: The aliphatic fraction containing leaf wax n-alkanes was analyzed

steps.description: The aliphatic fraction containing leaf wax n-alkanes was analyzed for compound-specific hydrogen isotope ratios (expressed as δD values) using a Delta-V-Plus Isotope Ratio Mass Spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific) coupled to a Trace GC 1310
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze compound-specific hydrogen isotope ratios (delta D) using GC-IRMS

steps.description: and for carbon isotope ratios (δ 13 C) on a Delta-V-Plus Isotope Ratio Mass Spectrometer coupled to an Agilent 7890 GC.
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze compound-specific carbon isotope ratios (delta 13C) using GC-IRMS

steps.description: δD (δ 13 C) values were normalized to the VSMOW (VPDB) scale using Schimmelmann's (Indiana University) n-alkane standard mix A6.
